September 4, 2024 
Determine Your Eligibility 
Key points 
CDC provides contracting opportunity for small businesses. CDC funds research and non-research projects via grants and cooperative agreements (awards). Learn how to determine eligibility for contracts and grants.
Contracts Funding Eligibility 
CDC is committed to helping small businesses grow and prosper and provides contracting opportunity for small businesses. In order to bid
